title: Gallan
content:
{{Top|leg|notoc=1}} {{Character |type=CIS |image=[[File:Gallan.jpg]] |name=Gallan |homeworld=[[Rendili/Legends|Rendili]][[Republic 69|''Republic'' 69]] |birth= |death=''[[Mersel Kebir]]'' over [[Rendili/Legends|Rendili]] |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him{{CSWECite|I|315|Gallan}} |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Brown]] |feathers= |eyes= |skin=Light |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] *[[Rendili Home Defense Fleet]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote| Why Yago? Why not just kill them and be done with it?!''"
"''Because, Gallan, they are of better use as hostages than as corpses. The Republic won't sacrifice a Jedi like Plo Koon or a noted officer like Captain Dodonna!|Gallan and Mellor Yago|}} '''Gallan''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] officer of the [[Rendili Home Defense Fleet]]. He served as a [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] and was stationed aboard the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] ''[[Mersel Kebir]]'' and supported fellow Lieutenant [[Mellor Yago]]'s coup against [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Jace Dallin]]. Gallan was executed by Yago during the [[Battle of Rendili]]. ==Behind the scenes== His name is also spelled Gallon in the comic. ==Appearances== *[[Republic 69|''Republic'' 69]] *[[Republic 70|''Republic'' 70]] *[[Republic 71|''Republic'' 71]] {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Gallan }} [[Category:Confederacy of Independent Systems navy officers]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Rendili residents]]
